race.comment: OUR JUSTIFY (10) looks well placed third up. Two runs back have netted two minor placings, running well for third in town at Caulfield in a 3yo race last time, beaten under a length. Handles all ground and should be very hard to hold out. BEST OF THE BEST (7) resumes. He didn't fire in one run last time in and was tipped out but looks to have come back better and profiles as an improver. CAPRICORN STAR (3) has been okay in three runs back and sets up well on speed on her favourable heavy going, expect she rolls forward and takes catching. CASHOUT (9) resumes for his second campaign having shown promise last time in, heavy unknown but profiles well. FRIENDZONED (15) has been sound in two heavy track runs this campaign and should be peaking now, hard to hold out.
